narrative:
Salem Twp township has 3,710 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a clear Republican lean of 8.0 percentage points.
